changes.value:
## What

The container tree diagram in ARCHITECTURE.md (lines ~456-466) duplicates what's already expressed in App.tsx. Every time the tree changes, both files must be updated — and they've already drifted multiple times. Replace the diagram with a reference to App.tsx as the source of truth, and add meaningful comments to App.tsx explaining WHY each container is ordered the way it is.

**Files to modify:**

1. `ARCHITECTURE.md` — Replace the ASCII container tree (lines ~456-466) with a brief statement like:
   > The container tree is defined in `kanban-app/ui/src/App.tsx`. Each container has inline comments explaining its placement and what it provides. See App.tsx for the authoritative hierarchy.

   Keep the prose descriptions of what containers DO (scope chain, command dispatch, etc.) — just remove the duplicated tree structure.

2. `kanban-app/ui/src/App.tsx` — Add comments on each container explaining WHY it's in that position:
   - `RustEngineContainer` — outermost because WindowContainer needs `useRustEngine()` (refreshEntities, entity state)
   - `WindowContainer` — wraps everything needing window identity (board events, AppShell keybindings)
   - `AppModeContainer` — inside window because mode transitions dispatch commands that need window scope
   - `BoardContainer` — conditional rendering (loading/empty/active), owns FileDropProvider and DragSessionProvider
   - `ViewsContainer` — must wrap PerspectivesContainer because PerspectiveProvider calls useViews()
   - `PerspectivesContainer/PerspectiveContainer` — filter/sort applied regardless of view type
   - `ViewContainer` — innermost content routing (BoardView/GridView)
   - `InspectorsContainer` — inside BoardContainer for FileDropProvider access, renders as overlay

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No ASCII container tree diagram in ARCHITECTURE.md
- [ ] ARCHITECTURE.md references App.tsx as the source of truth for the container hierarchy
- [ ] App.tsx has a comment on each container explaining WHY it's in that position
- [ ] Comments explain dependencies (e.g. "PerspectiveProvider needs ViewsProvider")

## Tests
- [ ] `cd kanban-app/ui && pnpm vitest run` — all pass (no code changes, only comments)
- [ ] Read ARCHITECTURE.md and App.tsx — no conflicting information"
Replace container tree diagram in ARCHITECTURE.md with reference to App.tsx — add "why" comments to source
